overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist running through medieval Baghdad. The character moves from narrow stone alleys through a bustling plaza with horses and guards, then into palm-lined residential streets, with an outfit change occurring near the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone alley with merchant cart

agents.ego_description: running steadily through a narrow stone alley, passing a wooden cart filled with pink flowers

entered.detail: tall beige stone wall forming the left boundary of the alley
tall beige stone wall forming the right boundary of the alley
wooden cart overflowing with pink and purple flowers
large decorative tree in a stone planter pot
stone archway leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow stone alleyway with high walls on both sides. A wooden cart filled with pink flowers sits on the right, and a large potted tree stands near an archway ahead. The lighting is bright with strong shadows cast by the midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage transitioning to open courtyard

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider courtyard area with large decorative archway

agents.ego_description: running through the archway passage toward an open plaza area ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes walking ahead toward the plaza

entered.detail: monumental stone archway with intricate carvings marking the plaza entrance
tall red fabric banners hanging from buildings
stone staircase leading up the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wider passage with a large decorative archway ahead. Red banners hang from buildings on the left, and the ground transitions to stone pavement. Pedestrians are visible ahead moving toward the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open plaza with military presence and burning braziers

events.description: enters large open plaza with armored horses, burning braziers, and crowds

agents.ego_description: running across the open plaza weaving between NPCs and armored horses

notable_agents.action: armored horse standing in the plaza near a building
guard standing near a burning brazier

entered.detail: large metal bowls with flames burning brightly
horses wearing decorative armor and cloth coverings
massive fortified gate with crenellated top marking the plaza exit
numerous pedestrians in period clothing walking through the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large sunlit plaza filled with activity. Armored horses stand near burning braziers, and crowds of NPCs move through the sandy ground. Red banners hang from the surrounding buildings, and a large fortified gate stands at the far end of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined residential street exiting the plaza

events.description: exits the plaza through the large gate into a narrower palm-lined residential street

agents.ego_description: running through the palm-lined residential street passing guards and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms standing guard near the wall

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street providing shade
walls constructed of mud bricks forming the buildings
wooden overhanging balconies on the residential buildings

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bustling plaza through a large gate into a quieter residential street lined with palm trees. Mud brick walls and wooden balconies characterize the architecture. Guards in red uniforms stand watch on the left as the character continues running through the shaded street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential district with mud brick houses and dense palm canopy

events.description: character's robe changes from white to black and white geometric pattern

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through residential streets as outfit changes to a black and white patterned disguise

entered.detail: multi-level residential buildings with wooden upper floors

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through the residential district with mud brick houses and palm trees. Around the 65-second mark, the character's white robe abruptly changes to a black and white geometric pattern. The environment remains consistent with narrow dirt streets and wooden architectural details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded stone alleyway that gradually opens into a bustling, sun-drenched city plaza. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow passage flanked by high walls, passing a cart of pink flowers and a potted tree under the harsh midday sun. As the character moves forward, the space expands into a wider passage where red banners line the buildings and the ground shifts to stone pavement beneath a decorative archway. The scene then opens fully into a large, sandy plaza filled with crowds of people and armored horses standing near burning braziers. Finally, the camera pushes toward the far end of the square, where the open activity of the city leads toward a massive fortified gate.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling public gateway into the quiet, shaded corridors of a residential district. It begins as the character exits a large gate, leaving the plaza behind to enter a street lined with towering palm trees and mud-brick walls. As the character runs deeper into the neighborhood, the camera passes guards in red uniforms stationed beside wooden balconies and traditional architecture. The scene then maintains its pace through the narrow dirt streets before the character's white robe abruptly shifts into a black and white geometric pattern. The movement finally carries the character further into the residential heart of the city, surrounded by the consistent textures of clay and timber.
